flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment fell 22% at Herkimer County Community College vs the 2018–2022 baseline (1.1k vs 1.5k).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at Herkimer County Community College fell 12% between 2021 and 2024 (1.3k → 1.2k).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Herkimer County Community College fell 12% between 2006 and 2009 (31.8% → 28.1%).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Herkimer County Community College fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (5.5% → 0.0%).
